text: A woman faces four ornate mirrors. One mirror reflects an empty dress standing upright, as if she stepped out of herself.
A cheerful room has been repaired so many times that every repair has become more visible than the original damage.
A person folds a towel with unnecessary precision immediately after receiving terrible news.
A corporate phrase about care is printed over a doorway no one can physically enter.
A birthday cake remains perfect while the table beneath it slowly bows under an invisible weight.
